## Summary

What changed.

## Why

Why this change is needed.

## User-facing behavior

What users or maintainers will notice.

## Verification

List exact commands, tests, builds, or manual checks run. If something was not
run, say "Not run" and explain why.

## Risk / privacy / security

Call out migration, compatibility, rollback, privacy, or security concerns.
For capture, permissions, local storage, exports, Keychain, Native Messaging,
AI, Logo.dev, screenshots, or logs, describe the concrete data-handling impact.
